title: Game Design
subtitle: GDD and design knowledge workflows
description: Reviewed AI Studio game-design workflow module. Owns primary GDD workflow, source routing, and knowledge workflow docs; shared reusable knowledge remains in ai_studio/game_design/knowledge_base/ while each game owns private design knowledge under games/<game-id>/design/knowledge/.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Game Design module contract: workflow ownership and boundary between shared reusable knowledge and private game knowledge.

children.title: knowledge_base/
children.description: Shared reusable game-development knowledge base: reusable knowledge pages and source notes. Per-game design knowledge remains under games/<game-id>/design/knowledge/.

children.title: Primary GDD Workflow
children.subtitle: concept to first playable
children.description: Workflow docs for turning a game idea into scoped GDD gates, gameplay loop data, visual proof, web GDD surfaces, and implementation handoff.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Primary GDD Workflow contract: role, use cases, flow, files, and skill surface.

children.title: core_workflow.md
children.description: Core GDD gates, minimum artifacts, start checklist, rehydrate protocol, report shape, and stop rules.

children.title: creative_intake.md
children.description: Short intake loop for unclear taste, meme anchors, visual targets, gameplay fantasy, or acceptance criteria.

children.title: design_stewardship.md
children.description: Rules for updating existing design docs without drift and keeping specs implementation-facing.

children.title: gameplay_systems.md
children.description: Player verbs, core loop, UI minimum, first slice, economy, and challenge contract guidance.

children.title: visual_proof.md
children.description: Visual proof tiers, fake shot requirements, runtime asset proof, and review packet guidance.

children.title: implementation_handoff.md
children.description: Source order, first playable packet, task breakdown, acceptance gates, and next prompt shape.

children.title: web_gdd_site.md
children.description: Visual GDD website requirements, sections, source-of-truth rules, and validation.

children.title: review.md
children.description: GDD-specific review stance, gate review, and routing to Quality rules.

children.title: templates.md
children.description: Small templates for Definition of Done, design decisions, reference rows, risk gates, and final status.

children.title: Design Knowledge Workflow
children.subtitle: source routing and promotion
children.description: Workflow docs for design source routing, source intake, reference-backed work, reusable knowledge promotion, and file templates.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Design Knowledge Workflow contract: data boundaries and file roles.

children.title: source_routing.md
children.description: Routing rules for reusable source notes, reusable knowledge, private game knowledge, game design folders, tasks, and temporary scratch data.

children.title: source_intake_promotion.md
children.description: Source intake and promotion workflow: source quality, evidence labels, and when to update knowledge indexes/logs.

children.title: reference_work_review.md
children.description: Reference-driven design work and review checklist for named references that guide gameplay, UI, economy, balance, art, or implementation decisions.

children.title: templates.md
children.description: Templates for reusable source notes, reusable knowledge pages, game source notes, and source review reports.

children.title: nt-primary-gdd
children.description: Skill surface for turning game concepts into scoped first playable GDDs through AI Studio Game Design workflow docs.

children.title: nt-design-knowledge
children.description: Skill surface for routing design sources and reusable game-design knowledge through the AI Studio Game Design workflow.
